name: wiki_search
description: Searches a local markdown wiki. Reads the wiki's index.md, finds pages relevant to the query by keyword scoring, and returns their full content in a single call. Use this before answering questions in a wiki-backed persona.

wiki_dir.description: Path to the wiki directory. Must contain an index.md file.

query.description: The question or topic to search for. Split into keywords and matched against page titles and summaries.
